q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign days (two observed groups) rather than comparing the observed value to an expected/baseline/typical value, so criterion (a) is not met.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports 6.722 vs 6.259 orders/day with n=72 and n=293, and provides a verdict of inconclusive (suggestive but not conclusive).
